title: Notification No.127/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 127/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs (Export), Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Andheri (E), Mumbai to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs (Import), Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Andheri (E), Mumbai; (ii) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs (Export), Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Andheri (E), Mumbai, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Davariya Brothers Pvt. Ltd., DW 6350, Bharat Diamond Bourse, D Block, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra(E), Mumbai–400051 issued vide show cause notice number DRI/AZU/GI- 2/ENQ-44(INT-5/13)/2014, dated the 22nd April, 2014 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad. [F No.437/63/2015-Cus.IV] (Z.R.Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
